title: Remove Mutual Exclusivity ABCD
description: Remove mutual exclusivity from Armor, Bow, Crossbow, & Damage enchantments. (All 4 protections, infinity+mending, piercing+multishot, sharp+smite+bane)
body:
This datapack removes mutual exclusivity from Armor, Bow, Crossbow, & Damage enchantments. 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y1scIZztypQ

To configure/customize the pack, go to data>minecraft>tags>enchantment>exclusive_set and delete the json of the unwanted enchantment categories.

Armor:
- Blast Protection
- Fire Protection
- Projectile Protection
- Protection

Bow:
- Infinity
- Mending

Crossbow:
- Multishot
- Piercing

Damage:
- Bane of Arthropods
- Sharpness
- Smite
